name: Japan Industrial Production (METI Indices of Industrial Production)
notes: T2 fallback for FRED JPNPROINDMISMEI (frozen 2024-03). All aggregator paths (FRED/OECD/IMF) frozen at 2023-11 — upstream OECD MEI freeze. e-Stat statsDataId 0003446463 is METI's IIP table. Wired §3.1 Stage D.4 2026-04-30. If the table has multiple slices we'll add cdCatNN filter in a follow-up.

name: Japan Tertiary Industry Activity Index (METI Indices of Tertiary Industry Activity)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. METI Indices of Tertiary Industry Activity (第3次産業活動指数). PROVISIONAL — 2026-06-11 catalogue investigation confirmed this series is published ONLY as Excel files via https://www.e-stat.go.jp/stat-search/files?toukei=00550360 and https://www.meti.go.jp/statistics/tyo/sanzi/result-2.html, NOT as a queryable getStatsData database table. The original statsDataId 0003348423 errored "does not exist" on the 2026-06-11 11:52 UTC run because no such database table exists. To wire this series we'll need either (a) a separate fetcher hitting the e-Stat file-download endpoint, or (b) METI direct via sources/meti_jp.py. Until then: leave PROVISIONAL — sources/estat.py logs a clear warning per failed fetch.

name: Japan Machinery Orders (Cabinet Office Orders Received for Machinery — private sector ex volatile)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension 2026-06-10. Cabinet Office Machinery Orders Statistics — 機械受注統計調査 主要長期時系列統計表 (private sector ex ships and electric power; the SA monthly long time-series). e-Stat catalogue: toukei 00100401, tstat 000001017809, statsDataId 0003355224 (replaces the wrong 0003193087 that errored "does not exist" on the 2026-06-11 11:52 UTC run). Catalogue URL https://www.e-stat.go.jp/stat-search/database?cycle=8&toukei=00100401&tstat=000001017809&statdisp_id=0003355224. Still needs cdCatNN filter to pin the private-ex-volatile SA slice; revisit on first credentialed fetch with the new ID.

name: Japan Household Real Expenditure (MIC Family Income and Expenditure Survey — two-or-more-person households)

MIC Family Income and Expenditure Survey (家計調査) — 用途分類 001 用途分類（総数）全国, monthly two-or-more-person households. e-Stat catalogue: toukei 00200561, statsDataId 0003000807 (replaces the wrong 0002070010 that errored "does not exist" on the 2026-06-11 11:52 UTC run). Catalogue URL https://www.e-stat.go.jp/stat-search/database?layout=dataset&statdisp_id=0003000807. Real consumption + YoY columns selectable via cdCat; revisit on first credentialed fetch. Alt candidate 0003343671 (品目分類 010, newer) if 用途分類 doesn't expose real YoY.
